title: Born to Speed
writer: Robert B. Churchill, Crane Wilbur, Scott Darling
actors: Johnny Sands, Vivian Austin, Don Castle
plot: Johnny Randall, a young race-car driver, falls in love with Tony Bradley, who hates racing because her brother was killed in a midget car-race (the car size, not the driver-size.) To compound that, his mother also objects because ...
